project_type: Next.js 15.5.18 app with Firebase backend, Tailwind CSS styling
test_framework: None found - no test files in the project
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/cv-portal to verify the project compiles without errors
setup_instructions: Dependencies already installed in node_modules. Run `npm run build` to verify.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is build-only. Firebase SDK 10.12.0 already includes firebase/storage module.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns:
- All pages use 'use client' directive for client-side rendering
- Form components use FormSection wrapper with card styling and InputField for each field
- Styling uses Tailwind CSS with custom component classes defined in globals.css (btn-primary, input-field, form-label, card)
- Firebase config in src/lib/firebase.js exports app, auth, db
- Auth context provides user object with user.uid
- Form state managed with useState, handleChange pattern
- Data saved to Firestore via setDoc
directory_structure:
src/app/ - Next.js app router pages
src/components/ - Reusable components (Navbar, CVTemplate, etc.)
src/context/ - React context providers (AuthContext)
src/lib/ - Library configs (firebase.js)
src/styles/ - Global CSS
